OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Lata Patel is present. Represented by K. Miranda .
Defendant Reece Barron Delores is present.
Attorney Theresa Cho representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties NOT enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of MAR-19-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
